title: crotalaria medicaginea var. rigida
intro: Crotalaria medicaginea var. rigida is a plant species belonging to the Crotalaria genus, commonly known as a type of rattlepod or buffel bean. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria medicaginea var. rigida include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it may also be used topically as a poultice or ointment.
